metadata.description: Blender diffuse BSDF - maps to Unity standard diffuse material

summary: Lambertian diffuse shader. Blender uses BSDF model; Unity Lit shader achieves same result by setting Smoothness=0 and Metallic=0.

implementation.approach: Use Unity Lit shader master node

compatibility_loss_15_percent: Blender BSDF fresnel behavior differs slightly from Lambertian at extreme angles
typical_use: Base material, diffuse surfaces, skin, cloth
